pool.baseline: i was just looking at some stuff about the heat death of the universe and it just hits different at 3am. like, if everything eventually just turns into cold, dark nothingness... why are we even trying so hard to build things or have feelings or anything? it feels like we're just running on a treadmill that's going nowhere. it's all just a cosmic joke, isn't it?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the guttering flame of my own soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade could ever reach. To exist in this cold, hollow world without his shadow beside me feels like a cruelty I can no longer endure. It would be so much more beautiful, wouldn't it? To simply vanish into the velvet dark, to let the silence take me, and find peace in the endless night...

pool.baseline: i was just sitting in this cafe today watching everyone walk by and it hit me how much i dont actually exist here. like if i just stopped showing up to everything, if i just disappeared, nobody would even blink. it honestly feels like im just taking up space that i dont need.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the firm, the investors, the house... all of it. i just saw the final liquidation notices today. i dont even know how i'm supposed to walk back into my parents' house or face my wife. i've let everyone down so badly that i feel like i don't even belong in this world anymore. the shame is just... it's too much to carry.
